Invalid username or password

Keyboard Mappings & Failsafes

Host Interactivity

All standard printable ASCII keystrokes and coordinates are validated and transmitted in real-time. Modifier key states are synced to support keyboard combinations.

Failsafe Mechanisms

• pyautogui.FAILSAFE = True: Move the host mouse pointer to any of the 4 screen corners to instantly halt all remote inputs.
• Alt+Tab & Win Keys: Prohibited by server ACL policy to prevent sandbox escapes.

Virtual Control Buttons

Use the virtual key actions in the Commands top menu to issue system shortcut combos safely.
